_prov.source: Google News RSS search — one query per SD-20 neighborhood plus one for Sen. Myrie
_prov.method: 10 queries (listed in 'queries'); items deduplicated by headline, filtered to the last 180 days by publication date, tagged to a topic by keyword match, sorted newest first. 465 unique articles collected; the page shows the 200 most recent.
_prov.caveats: Google News is relevance-ranked and caps each query near 100 results, so this is a broad sample, not a census of local coverage; a neighborhood name-match does not guarantee the story is inside SD-20; and topic tags are automated keyword guesses.
